usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF29-M trap (Requiring approval for low-stakes obvious fixes creates friction); produces complete Delta digest of hygiene defects (not status issues), writeback proposals with evidence_source per fi

decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct pipeline hygiene decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract

Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence
